passing_score_scale: Completion-based; embedded assessments per module; no unified pass/fail score
exam_format: Self-paced e-learning with embedded module assessments (online only)
id_requirements: Bloomberg account login required. No government ID required — courses are self-paced online.
exam_rules: Self-paced e-learning courses with embedded video lessons and knowledge checks. No proctoring, no time limits per module, no in-person testing. Completion certificate issued upon finishing all required modules. BMC can be completed via Bloomberg terminal or standalone web platform. Student access available via Bloomberg for Education (BESS) at no cost.
renewal_options: Bloomberg certificates do not expire and do not require renewal. Candidates may retake courses to refresh knowledge at no additional cost if they maintain an active Bloomberg subscription.

retake_policy.notes: Module assessments can be retaken immediately with no waiting period. Self-paced format; no attempt limits enforced.

official_study_resources.title: Bloomberg Market Concepts (course itself)
official_study_resources.notes: The course IS the certification. ~8 hours of content covering Economic Indicators, Currencies, Fixed Income, Equities, and Terminal Basics.

official_study_resources.title: Bloomberg for Education (BESS)
official_study_resources.notes: Free access to BMC and Bloomberg Finance Fundamentals for eligible students via their university's Bloomberg for Education subscription.
